summary: Implemented work_4 report and outputs in allowed paths. Added report module for deterministic pipeline_report.json generation (stages, timing, contracts snapshot, final-video artifact reference) and final-video materialization helper that creates final_video.mp4 only when absent (no overwrite). Integrated runPipeline to collect per-stage timings, write pipeline_report.json for both success and failure paths, and ensure final video generation after successful stages. Updated exports and expanded tests (new report.test.js plus run-pipeline/CLI assertions) to verify report content, deterministic output, final video existence, and no-mutation behavior. Full test suite passed.
